notes: Authored by hand from the adaptor source and Zoho docs; Zoho publishes no widely-available machine-readable OpenAPI 3.x for this legacy API. IMPORTANT CORRECTION: despite the task framing this adaptor as the Zoho CRM REST API, the published package only implements a single operation, addRow(db, table, rowData), which calls POST https://reportsapi.zoho.com/api/{account}/{db}/{table} with query params ZOHO_ACTION=ADDROW, ZOHO_OUTPUT_FORMAT=JSON, ZOHO_ERROR_FORMAT=JSON, authtoken and ZOHO_API_VERSION, and a form-encoded row body (see the `post`/`addRow` functions in dist/index.cjs). This is the legacy Zoho Reports (now Zoho Analytics) v1 Data API, not CRM. The spec models that action-driven API family: server is reportsapi.zoho.com/api (NOT www.zohoapis.com/crm/v2). Operations beyond addRow (exportData, createTable, getWorkspaceMetadata, listWorkspaces) are documented siblings on the same endpoint pattern and are included for coverage but are not directly exposed by the current adaptor. ZOHO_ACTION selects the operation rather than HTTP method/path; write siblings DELETE/UPDATE/IMPORT share addRow's path+method and are documented via the ZOHO_ACTION enum.
